    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=15790320
      GpuHashJoinExec
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=15790320
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=15790320
--- memory ---
total_cost=592

        GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=36, cost=36
